title.en: The Land Where Shamans Climb Between Heaven and Earth

summary.zh: 海外之西的巫者之国，国人右手操青蛇、左手操赤蛇；登葆山是群巫往来天地的天梯。大荒西经又记灵山十巫，巫咸为首，百药所聚。
summary.en: A nation of shamans in the far west, each gripping a green snake in the right hand and a red one in the left; Mount Dengbao is their ladder to heaven, and all medicines grow on nearby Mount Ling.

description.zh:
海外西经记：巫咸国在女丑尸的北面，国人右手握一条青蛇，左手握一条赤蛇。国中有登葆山，是「群巫所从上下」的地方——巫师们由此登天、由此下地，像走一道天梯。操蛇在《山海经》里是神与巫共用的仪仗，两手各持一色，是这个国度的通行装束。

大荒西经另记一座灵山：巫咸、巫即、巫朌、巫彭、巫姑、巫真、巫礼、巫抵、巫谢、巫罗十巫「从此升降，百药爰在」——十位巫师沿灵山上天下地，各种药材都聚生在这里。上古的巫兼掌通神与治病，采药与登天是同一趟差事，「巫医不分」的早期图景在这两段经文里最为完整。

为首的巫咸在传世文献里是个显赫名字：《尚书·君奭》记他辅佐商王太戊、安治王家；《世本》说「巫咸作筮」，把筮占的发明归于他；《离骚》里屈原失路彷徨时，正是「巫咸将夕降兮」，诗人怀揣椒糈等他降神决疑。一位商代名臣、一门占卜技艺、一个海外之国、一座百药灵山，都收拢在这个名字之下——巫咸国正是上古巫者集团在《山海经》地理里的投影。
description.en:
The Country of Wuxian lies north of the corpse of Nüchou, says the Beyond the Seas: West chapter; its people hold a green snake in the right hand and a red snake in the left. In the country rises Mount Dengbao, 'whence the assembled shamans ascend and descend' — a ladder between earth and heaven. Gripping snakes is regalia shared by gods and shamans throughout the Classic; here, one color to each hand is the national dress.

The Great Wilderness: West records a parallel institution on Mount Ling, where ten shamans — Wuxian, Wuji, Wufen, Wupeng, Wugu, Wuzhen, Wuli, Wudi, Wuxie, Wuluo — 'ascend and descend, and the hundred medicines are found there.' The archaic shaman worked both jobs at once: climbing to heaven to speak with spirits and gathering herbs to heal the sick. No passage preserves the early unity of shaman and physician more completely.

Wuxian himself is a famous name in transmitted literature. The Book of Documents has him steadying the royal house under the Shang king Taiwu; the Shiben credits him with inventing yarrow divination; and in the Li Sao it is Wuxian who 'descends at dusk' while the poet waits with offerings of pepper and rice for an oracle. A Shang minister, a divining art, an overseas nation, and a mountain of medicines all gather under one name: the Country of Wuxian is the ancient shamans' guild projected onto the map of the world.

value.en: North of Nüchou, containing Mount Dengbao

value.zh: 右手操青蛇，左手操赤蛇
value.en: Green snake in the right hand, red in the left

value.zh: 大荒西经灵山十巫，百药爰在
value.en: The ten shamans of Mount Ling, where all medicines grow

sources.en: Classic of Mountains and Seas, 'Beyond the Seas: West' and 'Great Wilderness: West'

volume.en: Classic of Regions Beyond the Seas: West
